Describe the sequence of actions performed on the glass baking dish during the preparation phase.
canonical_answer: At 14s, a red silicone trivet is placed inside the clear glass baking dish; at 15s, a hand sprays the interior of the dish with cooking spray; at 18s, a block of white substance is placed on the trivet; by 19s, a block of pale yellow butter rests on the red silicone strips.

question: Describe the initial ingredient layout and any interactions with the dish before cooking begins.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a can of chili and box of cream cheese sit inside the empty glass dish; at 10s, the shredded cheese container is visible next to the dish; at 12s, a finger points towards the bottom edge of the glass baking dish; at 14s, the dish appears empty with a red silicone trivet placed inside.
